spans.text: best directed through the maze Of thorny life
directed through the maze Of thorny life
to call That fill the poet's dream
the sound As of enchanting melodies , that stole , Stole gently , and entranced my captive soul
my mind's cold night The ray of Fancy shone
my mind's cold night The ray of Fancy shone
The river's bend , where the dark barge
time To Learning's tender eye thou didst unfold The classic page
stem the tossing tide , That he may leave his cave , and hear no more The Lemnian surges unrejoicing roar
my heart confess Its holier joy
The shivering breast , or softer pity thrill Even to the inmost heart
the autumnal heath the grey mists roll
the trance Which bound the erring fancy , till dark night
That swell from the full chord , and strong and clear , Beyond the tuneless couplets ' weak control
the skies , Where the mingled shouts arise , Where the steed , with fetlock red , Tramples the dying and the dead
side to side , Death his pale horse
the sounds , what wonder that I laid
( a dream-distempered thing ) Poor Fiction's realm my world
thy deathbed art cold , Who , with the tenderest touches
a recollection bland , And mingled sorrow , Warton , on thy tomb , To whom , if bloom they boast , they owe their bloom
